data.command:
cat > crates/cli/src/templates/cleanup/gitlab-session-review.yml.tmpl <<'EOF'
# opensession-managed-cleanup
opensession_session_review:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
  variables:
    GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  script:
    - set -eu
    - |
      encoded="$(python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, os
print(base64.urlsafe_b64encode(os.environ['CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME'].encode()).decode().rstrip('='))
PY
)"
      ledger_ref="refs/opensession/branches/${encoded}"
      artifact_branch="opensession/mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-sessions"
      has_ledger=0
      push_ok=0

      if git fetch --no-tags --depth=1 origin "+${ledger_ref}:${ledger_ref}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        has_ledger=1
        if git push origin "${ledger_ref}:refs/heads/${artifact_branch}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          push_ok=1
        fi
      fi

      if [ -n "${OPENSESSION_GITLAB_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] ]; then
        auth_header="PRIVATE-[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
      elif [ -n "${CI_JOB_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] ]; then
        auth_header="JOB-[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
      else
        echo "[opensession] warning: no token available for MR comment"
        exit 0
      fi

      body="<!-- opensession-auto-session-review -->
### OpenSession Session Artifact
- Ledger ref: \\`${ledger_ref}\\`
- Artifact branch: \\`${artifact_branch}\\`
- Artifact branch link: ${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/tree/${artifact_branch}
"

      if [ "$has_ledger" -ne 1 ]; then
        body="${body}
- Status: hidden ledger ref not found yet (no tracked sessions pushed)."
      elif [ "$push_ok" -ne 1 ]; then
        body="${body}
- Status: ledger found, but failed to push artifact branch (check runner push permissions)."
      else
        body="${body}
- Status: artifact branch updated."
      fi

      notes_api="${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}/notes"
      curl --silent --show-error --fail \
        --header "$auth_header" \
        --request POST \
        --data-urlencode "body=${body}" \
        "$notes_api" \
        >/dev/null || echo "[opensession] warning: failed to post MR comment"
EOF

# opensession-managed-cleanup
opensession_session_review:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
  variables:
    GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  script:
    - set -eu
    - |
      encoded="$(python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, os
print(base64.urlsafe_b64encode(os.environ['CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME'].encode()).decode().rstrip('='))
PY
)"
      ledger_ref="refs/opensession/branches/${encoded}"
      artifact_branch="opensession/mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-sessions"
      has_ledger=0
      push_ok=0

      if git fetch --no-tags --depth=1 origin "+${ledger_ref}:${ledger_ref}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        has_ledger=1
        if git push origin "${ledger_ref}:refs/heads/${artifact_branch}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          push_ok=1
        fi
      fi

      if [ -n "${OPENSESSION_GITLAB_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] ]; then
        auth_header="PRIVATE-[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
      elif [ -n "${CI_JOB_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] ]; then
        auth_header="JOB-[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
      else
        echo "[opensession] warning: no token available for MR comment"
        exit 0
      fi

      body="<!-- opensession-auto-session-review -->
### OpenSession Session Artifact
- Ledger ref: \\`${ledger_ref}\\`
- Artifact branch: \\`${artifact_branch}\\`
- Artifact branch link: ${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/tree/${artifact_branch}
"

      if [ "$has_ledger" -ne 1 ]; then
        body="${body}
- Status: hidden ledger ref not found yet (no tracked sessions pushed)."
      elif [ "$push_ok" -ne 1 ]; then
        body="${body}
- Status: ledger found, but failed to push artifact branch (check runner push permissions)."
      else
        body="${body}
- Status: artifact branch updated."
      fi

      notes_api="${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}/notes"
      curl --silent --show-error --fail \
        --header "$auth_header" \
        --request POST \
        --data-urlencode "body=${body}" \
        "$notes_api" \
        >/dev/null || echo "[opensession] warning: failed to post MR comment"

요청하신 “PR/MR 생성·갱신 시 아티팩트 브랜치 생성 + 코멘트 자동화”까지 반영 완료했습니다.

- 핵심 구현
1. `cleanup init` 시 GitHub/GitLab용 session-review 템플릿도 함께 생성되도록 확장  
[cleanup_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/cleanup_cmd.rs)
2. GitHub Action 템플릿 추가: PR `opened/reopened/synchronize`에서 `opensession/pr-<number>-sessions` 갱신 + PR 코멘트 upsert  
[github-session-review.yml.tmpl](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/templates/cleanup/github-session-review.yml.tmpl)
3. GitLab CI 템플릿 추가: MR pipeline에서 `opensession/mr-<iid>-sessions` 갱신 + MR note 작성  
[gitlab-session-review.yml.tmpl](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/templates/cleanup/gitlab-session-review.yml.tmpl)
4. GitLab managed include 블록이 cleanup + session-review 둘 다 포함하도록 업데이트  
[cleanup_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/cleanup_cmd.rs)
5. 문서/테스트 동기화  
[README.md](~/opensession/README.md)  
[README.ko.md](~/opensession/README.ko.md)  
[docs.md](~/opensession/docs.md)  
[handoff_cli.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/tests/handoff_cli.rs)

- 검증 결과
1. `cargo fmt` 통과
2. `./.githooks/pre-commit` 통과
3. `./.githooks/pre-push` 통과

사용자는 리포에서 1회 `opensession cleanup init --provider auto --yes`만 실행하면, 이후 GitHub/GitLab에서 PR/MR 이벤트마다 아티팩트 브랜치 + 코멘트 루틴이 동작합니다.

요청한 기준(큰 변경 금지, DRY 유지)으로 작은 개선만 적용했습니다.

1. 개선 내용
- 불필요한 문자열 할당 제거:
  - `parse_confirmation`에서 `to_ascii_lowercase()` 대신 `eq_ignore_ascii_case` 사용
  - `prompt_already_seen`은 `parse_truthy_value` 헬퍼로 공통화
- 입력 처리 안정화:
  - `looks_like_remote_url`에 `trim()` 반영
- 불필요 렌더링 제거:
  - `write_embedded_template`에서 빈 치환 렌더링(`render_template(..., &[])`) 제거
